app.title: Clue solver
app.description: Track a game of Clue and watch the solver narrow the case file down to one suspect, one weapon, and one room.

toolbar.newGameConfirm: Start a new game? This will clear all players, cards, known hands, and suggestions.

setup.title: Game setup
setup.startPlayingTitle: Lock the deck / player roster and start tracking suggestions
setup.editSetupTitle: Unlock the deck / player roster for editing
setup.loadPresetConfirm: Loading a preset will discard your current hand sizes, known cards, and suggestions. Continue?
setup.saveAsPresetTitle: Save the current category and card set as a reusable preset
setup.saveAsPresetPrompt: Save this card pack as a preset. Name it:
setup.handSizeMismatch: Hand sizes total {total} {total, plural, one {card} other {cards}}; should total {expected} after the {caseFileCount} case-file cards.
setup.removeCategoryMin: At least one category is required
setup.removeCardMin: At least one card per category is required

deduce.title: Deduction grid
deduce.footnoteLine: Candidate for suggestion {labels} — refuter's unseen card could be here.

initial-known-card.headline: Given
initial-known-card.detail: You marked this cell in the known-cards grid.

initial-hand-size.headline: Given
initial-hand-size.detail: Known from the player's hand size.

card-ownership.headline: Card ownership
card-ownership.detail: Each card has exactly one owner. Once {card} was ruled in or out for other owners, this cell was forced.

player-hand.headline: Hand size
player-hand.detail: {player}'s hand holds a fixed number of cards. Counting the Ys and Ns in their row forced this cell.

case-file-category.headline: Case file
case-file-category.detail: The case file contains exactly one {category}. Narrowing the category forced this cell.

non-refuters.detailKnown: The passer couldn't refute {suggester}'s suggestion, so they don't own any of the named cards.
non-refuters.detailUnknown: A player who passed can't hold the named cards.

refuter-showed.detailKnownNoCard: {refuter} refuted and showed the refuting card.

refuter-owns-one-of.detailKnown: {refuter} refuted {suggester}'s suggestion ({cardLabels}) but we didn't see the card. Once the other two were ruled out, this one was forced.
refuter-owns-one-of.detailUnknown: Refuter had to own one of the three cards; the other two were already ruled out.

recommendations.oneGuessFromCasefile: Could pin down the casefile {category} in one guess.
recommendations.probesManyCells: Probes {cellCount} unknown cells across other players' {categories} rows.
recommendations.refuterUncertainty: Any of {playerCount} players could refute — will reveal which one has a card.
recommendations.fillsCells: Fills in {cellCount, plural, one {# unknown cell} other {# unknown cells}} on other players' rows.

suggestions.title: Suggestion log
suggestions.resolveContradictionFirst: Resolve the contradiction to see recommendations.
suggestions.nothingUseful: Nothing useful to ask — you've already narrowed everything down.
suggestions.priorEmpty: No suggestions yet. Add one above.
suggestions.scoreBreakdownDetails: {info, plural, one {# unknown cell} other {# unknown cells}} × {combos, plural, one {# case-file combination} other {# case-file combinations}} × {refuters, plural, one {# possible refuter} other {# possible refuters}}
